name: Solutions — verticals you can ship today
content_html:
Solutions

Pick a vertical. Ship it next week.

Every solution below is a running demo on its own subdomain. Clone the instance, flip the plugin set, customise the CMS. No blank-canvas paralysis.

Enterprise overview How the accelerator works

Composable solutions

E-commerce (Shop)

Active plugins: shop, discount, stripe, cms, email, subscription.

Products, categories, cart, checkout, coupons. B2B-ready pricing tiers via the subscription plugin.

Live demo →

Hotel & hospitality booking

Active plugins: booking, cms, email, stripe, subscription.

Room calendar, instant confirmation, email flow. Booking plugin drives availability + rate cards.

Live demo →

Medical / professional services

Active plugins: booking, cms, email, stripe, subscription.

Same booking primitive as the hotel — re-skinned as a clinic intake. Same engine, different frame.

Live demo →

Software / digital goods catalogue

Active plugins: ghrm, subscription, stripe, cms, email.

GitHub-backed catalogue. Subscribers get token-metered access to private repos.

Live demo →

SaaS billing & subscriptions

Active plugins: every plugin except shop + booking (13 total).

Three payment providers, analytics, email, LLM chat, tarot-reading demo — everything the SDK ships.

Live demo →

CMS-first content site

Active plugins: cms only.

Pages, layouts, widgets, menus, styles, categories. Blog / marketing site without any commerce overhead.

Main vbwd.cc →

What's shared across all six?

Auth + users

Single auth layer, roles, access levels. Every vertical uses it; none of them reimplements it.

CMS + theme system

6 colour themes × 2 widths = 12 combinations. Same widgets, same admin — just different content per vertical.

Plugin lifecycle

Enable / disable / configure any plugin from the admin UI. Live on prod, no redeploy.

Need a vertical that isn't here yet?

Write a plugin. See the accelerator for the starter kit.

Talk to us
meta_title: Solutions — six verticals on one VBWD platform
meta_description: Six running demos: shop, hotel, clinic, software store, SaaS billing, CMS-only. Same codebase, different plugin config.
